note: Two reputable sources (testpdr.online/manualov.net q171 with same option order, and vodiy.ua/tg/197) both mark 'Ліворуч' correct = our option 4. Rule 8.8б: regulator's right arm forward → from left side trams go only left (рукав-у-рукав). Our stored answer 3 ('Ліворуч або праворуч') is wrong; alt_read 4 is right.
